queries: ("Perfluorooctane Sulfonic Acid"[Supplementary Concept] OR PFOS[tiab] OR "perfluorooctane sulfonic acid"[tiab] OR perfluorooctane sulfonate[tiab] OR perfluorooctanesulfonate[tiab] OR "perfluorooctane sulphonic acid"[tiab] OR perfluorooctane sulphonate[tiab] OR "Perfluoroalkyl Substances"[Mesh]) AND ("Pregnancy"[Mesh] OR "Pregnant Women"[Mesh] OR "Infant, Newborn"[Mesh] OR pregnan*[tiab] OR maternal[tiab] OR prenatal[tiab] OR antenatal[tiab] OR neonat*[tiab] OR newborn*[tiab])

(("Perfluorooctane Sulfonic Acid"[Supplementary Concept] OR PFOS[tiab] OR perfluorooctane sulfon*[tiab] OR perfluorooctanesulfon*[tiab] OR perfluorooctane sulphonic*[tiab]) AND ("Birth Weight"[Mesh] OR "birth weight"[tiab] OR birthweight[tiab] OR "low birth weight"[tiab] OR LBW[tiab])) AND ("Pregnancy"[Mesh] OR pregnan*[tiab] OR prenatal[tiab] OR maternal[tiab] OR "Infant, Newborn"[Mesh] OR neonat*[tiab] OR newborn*[tiab])

(("Perfluoroalkyl Substances"[Mesh] OR "Perfluorooctane Sulfonic Acid"[Supplementary Concept]) AND ("Pregnancy"[Mesh] OR "Infant, Newborn"[Mesh]) AND ("Birth Weight"[Mesh] OR "Infant, Small for Gestational Age"[Mesh] OR "Fetal Growth Retardation"[Mesh] OR "Fetal Growth Restriction"[Mesh])) AND ("Cohort Studies"[Mesh] OR "Prospective Studies"[Mesh] OR "Case-Control Studies"[Mesh] OR "Cross-Sectional Studies"[Mesh] OR "Epidemiologic Studies"[Mesh]) NOT (animals[mh] NOT humans[mh])

((PFOS[tiab] OR perfluorooctane sulfon*[tiab] OR perfluorooctanesulfon*[tiab] OR perfluorooctane sulphonic*[tiab] OR "perfluoroalkyl"[tiab] OR "polyfluoroalkyl"[tiab] OR "perfluorinated compound*"[tiab]) AND (pregnan*[tiab] OR maternal[tiab] OR prenatal[tiab] OR antenatal[tiab] OR neonat*[tiab] OR newborn*[tiab] OR "cord blood"[tiab] OR "maternal serum"[tiab] OR "cord serum"[tiab])) AND ("birth weight"[tiab] OR birthweight[tiab] OR "low birth weight"[tiab] OR LBW[tiab] OR "small for gestational age"[tiab] OR SGA[tiab] OR "fetal growth"[tiab] OR "foetal growth"[tiab] OR "growth restriction"[tiab]) AND (cohort[tiab] OR "birth cohort"[tiab] OR prospectiv*[tiab] OR longitudinal[tiab] OR "case-control"[tiab] OR "cross-sectional"[tiab] OR epidemiolog*[tiab] OR observational[tiab] OR "dose-response"[tiab] OR gradient[tiab] OR quartile*[tiab] OR tertile*[tiab])

("Perfluorooctane Sulfonic Acid"[Supplementary Concept] OR PFOS[tiab] OR perfluorooctane sulfon*[tiab] OR perfluorooctane sulphonic*[tiab]) AND ("Blood, Umbilical"[Mesh] OR "cord blood"[tiab] OR "maternal serum"[tiab] OR "cord serum"[tiab]) AND (pregnan*[tiab] OR prenatal[tiab] OR "Pregnancy"[Mesh] OR "Infant, Newborn"[Mesh])

inclusion_criteria: Human observational studies of pregnant women and their newborns (e.g., mother–infant pairs).

Quantitative maternal or cord PFOS exposure measured during pregnancy or at delivery (e.g., serum/plasma/cord blood) with a comparison across exposure levels (e.g., high vs low, quantiles, or per-unit increase).
Reports infant birth weight in grams or provides sufficient data to derive/convert it (e.g., mean/SD, regression coefficients).
Cohort, case–control, or cross-sectional designs published as full-text peer‑reviewed articles.
exclusion_criteria: Animal, in vitro, ecological studies, or populations other than pregnant women/newborns.
PFAS exposure that does not include PFOS or does not provide PFOS-specific estimates; exposure not quantified or lacking a comparator/gradient.
Does not report birth weight in grams or data to derive it (e.g., only low birth weight odds without continuous birth-weight data).
Study types such as reviews, editorials, commentaries, protocols, case reports, conference abstracts without extractable data, or interventional trials unrelated to PFOS exposure.
screening_criteria.description: Screening to identify human observational studies assessing the association between maternal/cord PFOS levels and newborn birth weight (grams), comparing higher vs lower exposure levels.
